1.name: Strix
1.description: [1] : Call on the wind to bring the sound of distant conversations to the caster.

1.name: Strix [1]
1.description: Call on the wind to bring the sound of distant conversations to the caster.

2.name: Scobax
2.description: [2] : Summon swarms of insects and vermin the caster cannot control them beyond the summoning, they're merely incited to wreak havoc.

2.name: Scobax [2]
2.description: Summon swarms of insects and vermin the caster cannot control them beyond the summoning, they're merely incited to wreak havoc.

3.name: Masca
3.description: [3] : Take on the form of a beast whose blood the user drank until the next sunrise.

3.name: Masca [3]
3.description: Take on the form of a beast whose blood the user drank until the next sunrise.

4.name: Hexe
4.description: [4] : Twist and mutate a target's body with a powerful curse.

4.name: Hexe [4]
4.description: Twist and mutate a target's body with a powerful curse.

5.name: Fractura
5.description: [5] : Create barbed tentacles from the caster's own blood.

5.name: Fractura [5]
5.description: Create barbed tentacles from the caster's own blood.
